candidate.name: Promote deployable low-friction traction recovery
candidate.hypothesis: Signed slip evidence, deployable contact-loss classification, conservative delay-aware traction authority, and governed release into transition control can recover low-friction forward motion without previewing Scenario friction or future commands.
candidate.expectedEffect: Eliminate every hard traction violation, retain command-tracking, command-transition, and spatial-generalization gates, and preserve friction 0.1 as explicit non-gating stress evidence.

from.name: Spatial quadruped with motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history
